Package models.common.workers

Class GeneralMultipleWorker

  • java.lang.Object
    • models.common.workers.Worker
      • models.common.workers.GeneralMultipleWorker
  • @Entity
public class GeneralMultipleWorker
extends Worker
    DB entity of the concrete Worker if a study is run as an General Multiple Worker. A General Multiple Worker is a worker for an external run, the worker can run the study many times. The worker is created during start of the study.
